arabicText: وَتَفْسِيرُ هَذَا الْبَيْتِ يَرْجِعُ إِلَى مَا كَتَبَهُ أَئِمَّةُ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ
latinTransliteration: Wa tafsīru hādhal-bayti yarji‘u ilā mā katabahu a'immatush-sīratin-nabawiyyah
englishTranslation: The explanation of this verse traces back to what the leaders of prophetic biography wrote.
wolofTranslationStandard: Mbiir mii, firi na ko ci li sunu boroom xam-xam yi bind ci dundug Yonent bi.
wolofalAjamiScript: مْبِيرْ مِي فِرِ نَ كُ سِ لِ سُنُ بُرُومْ خَمْ خَمْ يِ بِنْدْ سِ دُنْدُجْ يُونِࣺنْتْ بِ

arabicText: حَيْثُ ذَكَرَ الْحَافِظُ فِي فَتْحِ الْبَارِي بَيَانَ دَقَائِقِ هَذِهِ الْوَاقِعَةِ
latinTransliteration: Ḥaythu dhakaral-ḥāfiẓu fī Fatḥil-Bārī bayāna daqā'iqi hādhihil-wāqi‘ah
englishTranslation: Where the master of Hadith mentioned in Fath al-Bari the clarification of this incident.
wolofTranslationStandard: Ci lolu la Seriñ bi wax ci firi banti mbir jii ci dëgg dëgg.
wolofalAjamiScript: سِ لُلُ لَ سِرِجْ بِ وَخْ سِ فِرِ بَنْتِ مْبِرْ جِي سِ دِࣺجّ دِࣺجّ

arabicText: فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى فَهْمِ هَذِهِ الشُّرُوحِ لِتَعْلَمَ عِظَمَ قَدْرِ الْمُصْطَفَى
latinTransliteration: Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā fahmi hādhihish-shurūḥi li-ta‘lama ‘iẓama qadril-Muṣṭafā
englishTranslation: So be diligent in understanding these commentaries to appreciate the greatness of the Chosen One.
wolofTranslationStandard: Fexeel ba xam firi yii ngir nga guis màkkay Yonent bi ca kaw.
wolofalAjamiScript: فِخِيلْ بَ خَمْ فِرِ يِي نْجِرْ نْجَ جِيسْ مَكَّيْ يُونِࣺنْتْ بِ سَ كَوْ

arabicText: وَالْحِكْمَةُ مِنْ ذَلِكَ هِيَ بَيَانُ رِفْعَةِ الرَّسُولِ وَمَكَانَتِهِ الْعَالِيَةِ
latinTransliteration: Wal-ḥikmatu min dhālika hiya bayānu rif‘atir-Rasūli wa makānatihil-‘āliyah
englishTranslation: And the wisdom behind this is to clarify the elevation and high standing of the Messenger.
wolofTranslationStandard: Te xam-xam bi ñu sotti ci, dëgëral na kàttanu Yonent bi ak ubbéem.
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ خَمْ خَمْ بِ نُ سُتِّ سِ دِࣺجِࣺرَلْ نَ كَتَّنُ يُونِࣺنْتْ بِ اَكْ أُبِّيمْ

arabicText: وَتَفْسِيرُ هَذَا الْبَيْتِ يَرْجِعُ إِلَى مَا كَتَبَهُ أَئِمَّةُ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ [5]
latinTransliteration: Wa tafsīru hādhal-bayti yarji‘u ilā mā katabahu a'immatush-sīratin-nabawiyyah (5)
englishTranslation: The explanation of this verse traces back to what the leaders of prophetic biography wrote. (Stanza 5)
wolofTranslationStandard: Mbiir mii, firi na ko ci li sunu boroom xam-xam yi bind ci dundug Yonent bi. (Wers 5)

latinTransliteration: Ḥaythu dhakaral-ḥāfiẓu fī Fatḥil-Bārī bayāna daqā'iqi hādhihil-wāqi‘ah (6)
englishTranslation: Where the master of Hadith mentioned in Fath al-Bari the clarification of this incident. (Stanza 6)
wolofTranslationStandard: Ci lolu la Seriñ bi wax ci firi banti mbir jii ci dëgg dëgg. (Wers 6)

latinTransliteration: Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā fahmi hādhihish-shurūḥi li-ta‘lama ‘iẓama qadril-Muṣṭafā (7)

wolofTranslationStandard: Fexeel ba xam firi yii ngir nga guis màkkay Yonent bi ca kaw. (Wers 7)

wolofalAjamiScript: مْبِيرْ مِي فِرِ نَ كُ سِ لِ سُنُ بُرُومْ خَمْ خَمْ يِ بِنْدْ سِ دُنْدُجْ يُونِࣺنْتْ بِ [25]

arabicText: حَيْثُ ذَكَرَ الْحَافِظُ فِي فَتْحِ الْبَارِي بَيَانَ دَقَائِقِ هَذِهِ الْوَاقِعَةِ [26]
latinTransliteration: Ḥaythu dhakaral-ḥāfiẓu fī Fatḥil-Bārī bayāna daqā'iqi hādhihil-wāqi‘ah (26)
englishTranslation: Where the master of Hadith mentioned in Fath al-Bari the clarification of this incident. (Stanza 26)
wolofTranslationStandard: Ci lolu la Seriñ bi wax ci firi banti mbir jii ci dëgg dëgg. (Wers 26)

arabicText: فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى فَهْمِ هَذِهِ الشُّرُوحِ لِتَعْلَمَ عِظَمَ قَدْرِ الْمُصْطَفَى [27]

englishTranslation: So be diligent in understanding these commentaries to appreciate the greatness of the Chosen One. (Stanza 27)
wolofTranslationStandard: Fexeel ba xam firi yii ngir nga guis màkkay Yonent bi ca kaw. (Wers 27)
